executionArgs.additionalInstruction: App uses HashRouter: base URL is http://localhost:5173/ with routes at #/, #/goals, #/journal, #/failures, #/session, #/trash. Do NOT require login: VITE_AUTH_ENABLED=false in testsprite mode. Skip /login unless testing auth explicitly. On API/network failure, continue UI exploration and assert graceful empty/error states. Prefer mobile viewport checks for overflow and tap targets.
